---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact — Glenn Moncrieff"
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-head wrap">
  <span class="mono">// Get in touch</span>
  <h1>Contact</h1>
  <p>I am open to collaborations, talks, or conversations. Email is the best way to reach me.</p>
</header>

<section class="section wrap">
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="field-list">
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">Email</span>
        <span class="field__v"><a href="mailto:glennmoncrieff@gmail.com">glennmoncrieff@gmail.com</a><span class="sub">Usually the fastest way to reach me.</span></span>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">Affiliation</span>
        <span class="field__v">The Nature Conservancy, Global Science<span class="sub">previously SAEON Fynbos Node and SEEC, University of Cape Town</span></span>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">Based in</span>
        <span class="field__v">Cape Town, South Africa</span>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">GitHub</span>
        <span class="field__v"><a href="https://github.com/GMoncrieff" target="_blank" rel="noopener">github.com/GMoncrieff</a></span>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">Scholar</span>
        <span class="field__v"><a href="https://scholar.google.co.za/citations?user=_FFdaCUAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Scholar</a></span>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <span class="field__k">LinkedIn</span>
        <span class="field__v"><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/glenn-moncrieff-a50879227" target="_blank" rel="noopener">glenn-moncrieff</a></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div>
      <img src="assets/avatar.png" alt="Glenn Moncrieff" style="width:100%; max-width:300px; aspect-ratio:1/1; object-fit:cover; border-radius:var(--radius); border:1px solid var(--border); display:block; margin-bottom:24px;" />
    
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
